subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! From thy letter an exquisite melody was heard, for verily thou art magnetized by the celestial realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب ملکوت الله از نامه ات حالت خوشی سر داد زیرا فی الحقیقه منجذب ملکوتی
subcodes.subjects: @education and the development of capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
